title: Delivery Prompts (landing)
what_it_is: A short canonical index/landing page (ratified 2026-07-06, PO batch approval) pointing to the two 'operating prompts' that drive Studio delivery against Linear: the Orchestrator Prompt — Delivery (gkkUDzn277, the Act-3 Delivery Orchestrator) and the Issue Authoring Prompt (9VUHxAcoXw). It also links out to the family canon root (CxjFpIVUZY), Coding Standards (6aMAzsYeQb), the SE-Architect review agent (8sYi523i4t), and the programme-level dashboard page (cLWfnuXCWb). It documents the Linear work hierarchy (Initiative TBD -> Project 'Orvex AI Studio' -> Milestones -> Issues) and flags the delivery-source-of-truth mechanism as an open decision. Adapted from Houston's Prompts page, 2026-07-05.
overlaps: Duplicates/overlaps the programme-level dashboard page cLWfnuXCWb, which links the same prompt set (Issue Authoring Prompt, Act-3 Delivery Orchestrator) plus this page itself -- two landing surfaces for the same machinery. More importantly, this page is now INCOMPLETE relative to the current model of record: it was ratified 2026-07-06, before the 4-phase Delivery Program (5eFdxN3edd, authored 2026-07-13) introduced the Foundation Orchestrator (UKanXYLCQD) and the three phase orchestrator prompts (P1 yXUWpQpRjx, P2 Ng66su4dVG, P2.5 ErYdXzIj6g) that now actually drive execution on top of this same Act-3/Issue-Authoring machinery. A reader landing here today would reasonably conclude the Act-3 Delivery Orchestrator + Issue Authoring Prompt are the whole prompt set and miss the phase layer entirely -- real confusion risk. Separately: this page is NOT the right home for the new parallel-build-plan.md (8-teams-by-service, contract-tag unlock) -- that content belongs folded into the Phase-2 'Isolated Builds' orchestrator (Ng66su4dVG) or as a child of the Delivery Program (5eFdxN3edd), not appended here.
recommendation_detail: Keep this page as the reusable-machinery landing/index (do not archive or merge away) but add cross-references: (1) a breadcrumb up to the Delivery Program 5eFdxN3edd as the current plan of record, and (2) links down to the Foundation Orchestrator (UKanXYLCQD) and the three phase orchestrator prompts (P1 yXUWpQpRjx, P2 Ng66su4dVG, P2.5 ErYdXzIj6g), clarifying that those phase prompts invoke this page's Act-3 Delivery Orchestrator + Issue Authoring Prompt as shared machinery rather than replacing them. Do not land the new parallel-build-plan.md content on this page.
